prompt: Set up TurboDocx TurboPartner in my Django app so I can provision and manage customer organizations through API endpoints.

assertions.name: config-file-created
assertions.description: A TurboPartner config file was created

assertions.name: config-has-turbopartner
assertions.description: Config file calls TurboPartner.configure with partner API key and partner ID env vars

assertions.name: views-created
assertions.description: Django views file was created for partner/organization management

assertions.name: urls-wired
assertions.description: URL patterns are defined and included in the project urls.py

assertions.name: uses-django-patterns
assertions.description: Generated code uses Django patterns (views, urlpatterns, JsonResponse or DRF serializers)

assertions.name: no-fastapi-patterns
assertions.description: Generated code does NOT use FastAPI patterns (APIRouter, FastAPI(), @app.post)

assertions.name: no-sign-vars
assertions.description: .env does NOT contain TURBODOCX_API_KEY (user only asked for TurboPartner)
